strengths: Proficient with Power BI and Tableau
Cloud and warehouse experience (Snowflake, BigQuery, S3)
weaknesses: No explicit mortgage servicing domain experience
Title not explicitly 'Data Analyst' at tech scale (recent roles varied)
improvement_bullets: Developed robust data transformation workflows using dbt and SQL to standardize complex datasets, ensuring high data quality and schema consistency for downstream reporting.
Led large-scale data migrations by auditing legacy reporting structures and mapping them to standardized data schemas to facilitate seamless integration into client environments.
Partnered with data engineering teams to build scalable infrastructure, leveraging Python and SQL to automate data pipelines and enhance reporting performance.
Analyzed complex mortgage-adjacent datasets to uncover borrower risk patterns, effectively translating technical data insights into actionable business strategies for stakeholders.
Utilized BI tools like Tableau and Power BI to perform dashboard migrations, delivering modernized, user-friendly interfaces that accelerated client decision-making processes.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Forward Deployed Data Analyst II opportunity with Valon. I am interested in this opportunity because of your unique mission to build an AI-native operating system for regulated finance. What interests me about working for Valon is its approach to modernizing the mortgage servicing industry through vertical integration and high-margin software innovation, which intrigues me because it combines complex domain engineering with high-impact data analytics. I believe my advanced SQL data modeling capabilities and my experience in customer-facing analytics would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by prioritizing clear communication and technical rigor. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I identified a bottleneck in our reporting infrastructure, which led me to design and implement a comprehensive data dashboarding system from scratch. This shift reduced data processing time by 40% and directly empowered the executive team to make faster, data-driven decisions regarding lead generation. Ultimately, I know that the Forward Deployed Data Analyst II role at Valon would allow me to bring my expertise in end-to-end data pipelines to client-facing reporting and system migrations. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my data infrastructure and cross-functional collaboration skills. I spent my time there integrating data from disparate APIs and PostgreSQL databases to build unified schemas that supported our Underwriting and Product teams. This project reduced delivery delays by 25% and ensured that engineers had access to clean, reliable data. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my ability to bridge the gap between technical data engineering and business-critical operations in working on client-side migrations at Valon. I know that my background in SQL/Python and my commitment to data integrity align with what it takes to succeed at the Forward Deployed Data Analyst II role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
